rules.name: Stale site data
rules.recommended_action: Check DAS heartbeat and compare with revenue meter or utility portal.

rules.name: Critical stale data
rules.recommended_action: Escalate to DAS/SCADA provider and mark operational state unknown.

rules.name: Impossible negative production
rules.recommended_action: Check meter sign convention, CT orientation, and net load/backfeed rules.

rules.name: PI suspiciously high
rules.recommended_action: Validate expected model, irradiance inputs, capacity, and meter scaling.

rules.name: Expected energy missing
rules.condition: expected_energy_kwh is null or expected_energy_kwh == 0 during daylight with irradiance > 200 W/m2
rules.recommended_action: Check expected model generation and weather feed.

rules.name: Irradiance sensor likely failed
rules.condition: poa_irradiance_wm2 is flat, null, negative, or inconsistent with nearby weather/site production
rules.recommended_action: Compare POA to GHI/weather feed and nearby sites.

rules.name: Meter and SCADA mismatch
rules.recommended_action: Reconcile meter and SCADA interval data; check CT/PT ratios and multipliers.
